revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[User:Immanuelle/sandbox]] to [[Draft:Shrines to Emperors]]
[[WP:AES|←]]Removed redirect to [[Draft:Shrines to Emperors]]
removed [[Category:Kasuga-taisha]]; added [[Category:Kamo shrines]] using [[WP:HC|HotCat]]

revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Kamo Faith | title = [[Kamo shrines|Kamo Faith]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Kasuga-taisha11bs3200.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * [[Kamowakeikazuchinomikoto]] * ''[[Tamakushi-hime]]'' (玉依姫命) * ''[[Kamotaketsunumi no Mikoto]]'' (賀茂建角身命)
|group2 = Shrines |list2 = * [[Kamigamo Shrine]] * [[Shimogamo Shrine]]
|group4 = Misc |list4 = * [[Fujiwara clan]] * [[Nakatomi clan]] * [[Kasugayama Primeval Forest]]
}}<noinclude>
[[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] [[Category:Kamo shrines]] </noinclude>

{{Navbox | name = Kamo Faith | title = [[Kamo shrines|Kamo Faith]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Kasuga-taisha11bs3200.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * [[Kamowakeikazuchinomikoto]] * ''[[Tamakushi-hime]]'' (玉依姫命) * ''[[Kamotaketsunumi no Mikoto]]'' (賀茂建角身命)

}}<noinclude>
